summary: Pass based on the provided source context. The reminder flow uses clear user-facing language for setting and updating reminders, the timing options are expressed in natural terms, reminder status is shown with human-readable dates and safe fallbacks, and the saved reminder state is reflected back on item detail and full-plan surfaces without visible internal implementation language.
